name: Clearing member
description: The clearing member of the CCP facility through which the transaction was cleared.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required if Cleared is reported as Y, for Action types NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI.
May be optionally reported where Cleared is reported as I, for Action types NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI.
Not reported where Cleared is reported as N.
Not reported for Action types TERM, EROR, PRTO.
valueRules: Reported as the LEI of the clearing member that may be of any registration status in the GLEIF database.
Must not be an LEI of a branch of the entity.
If reported, Clearing member does not equal Central counterparty.
Counterparties that directly clear (as a clearing member themselves) report themselves as both Counterparty 1 and Clearing member.
